OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Mary McLain; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Mark Epstein, Esq. representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff 2306 Market St. Apartments.

David A. Butler, Esq., for and with the defendant Dennis Jones.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case settled, parties entered into a signed agreement, which was filed.
Trial date vacated.
